2114590.name: Exhale XR - Roaming
2114590.description:
Enhance your experience within the Exhale XR app with this VR immersion from the Exhale wellness library.

Experience Details
Set about next to the largest electronic carillon in the world, standing 13 stories tall. Appreciate the surrounding designs and calming lake. Next, join in the sounds and shimmers of a summer morning in the forest. Ending your exploration you will find yourself seated on a bench next to a gentle waterfall in a botanical garden..

Purpose
Calming

Length
10:33

Specs
360° video
3840x2160
29.97fps
.mp4 file type
2114590.supported_languages:
